headline: Nord Stream blasts due to war, say insurers seeking to avoid pay out
summary: The Nord Stream gaspipelines were attacked in 2022 as a direct result of Russia'sinvasion of Ukraine, insurers told a London court on Thursday asthey seek to avoid paying out nearly 580 million...
